headline: Stop snacking today—you're one week behind schedule
summary: You're gaining 0.28 kg/week when you need -0.66 kg/week; today you choose the deficit by controlling portions and moving.
details: First: replace emotional snacking with Huel today—no exceptions, no justifications. Second: 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill to create active deficit. Third: Sunday is your weakness window, and every choice today compounds across the week; this small deficit sets the tone for recovery toward your 88 kg goal.
